originalTitle: Yes, the AI stock selloff looks terrifying. But it might actually save the bull market.
summary: The hottest tech trades of 2026 just got slammed — smart investors are buying anyway.
content: The hottest tech trades of 2026 just got slammed — smart investors are buying anyway.
chineseTitle: 是的，AI 股票的抛售看起来很可怕。但它实际上可能会拯救牛市。
chineseSummary: 2026 年最热门的科技交易刚刚遭受重创——聪明的投资者无论如何都会买入。
chineseContent: 2026 年最热门的科技交易刚刚遭受重创——聪明的投资者无论如何都会买入。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
